detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DividendDistributor.loggedTransfer(uint256,bytes32,address,address) (DividendDistributor.sol#101-111):
	External calls:
	- ! target.call.value(amount)() (DividendDistributor.sol#105)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(amount,message,target,currentOwner) (DividendDistributor.sol#109)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [DividendDistributor.loggedTransfer(uint256,bytes32,address,address)](DividendDistributor.sol#L101-L111):
	External calls:
	- [! target.call.value(amount)()](DividendDistributor.sol#L105)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [Transfer(amount,message,target,currentOwner)](DividendDistributor.sol#L109)
